features: COMPATIBLE MODEL: Compatible with Dyson V7 Animal Cordless HEPA Vacuum, V7 Absolute Cord-Free Vacuum, V7 Fluffy Vacuum, V7 Animal Cordless Stick Vacuum, V7 Animal Cord Free Vacuum, V7 Motorhead, V7 Absolute Stick Vacuum Pet Hair Vacuum (Not fit for V6 V8 or V10), Please check your device model before placing your order.

HIGH CAPACITY: 6500mAh Higher capacity battery for V7, power more than Original or Other Battery .Brand new 0 cycle, last over 1000 cycles . Store more power, extend battery life and standby time, Say goodbye to the trouble of insufficient old batteries!

High Quality Li-on Battery: Each battery for Dyson V7 has tested under strict quality inspection and testing. The built-in A-grade high-quality batteries can effectively prevent overcharge, overdischarge and overheat protection, short circuit protection, and durable.

Smart LED light: Replacement battery for Dyson V7 can indicate the battery status by the indicator light. Steady blue light means charging or working, no light means fully charged, yellow light means needs to be cooled down
What You Get: Package include 1 x Replacement V7 Battery, 1 X Post-Filters, 1 x Pre Filter, 1 X Cleaning Brush, 1 X Dust Cover, 1 x Screwdriver, 3 X Screws, 1 X User Manual
description: Product Description Are you having a horrible time with your battery for V7? Is it no longer taking a charge or is draining to quickly? The more you use the device, the more capacity of your battery will be reduced. There's no need to worry. TAYUZH battery replacement for V7 will remedy the problems you are meeting , Let your Console back to life, so that you can play longer games. FEATURES: Made of best quality grade A+ cell in battery market Build-in special microchip to prevent against short-circuiting,over-charging,over-discharging and over-heating PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS: Compatible Model: V7 Animal Cordless HEPA Vacuum, V7 Absolute Cord-Free Vacuum, V7 Fluffy Vacuum, V7 Animal Cordless Stick Vacuum, V7 Animal Cord Free Vacuum, V7 Motorhead, V7 Absolute Stick Vacuum Pet Hair Vacuum Battery Type : Rechargeable Li-ion Battery For Best Performance: Make sure to fully charge and discharge your new battery 3 to 5 time, full performance and longevity is only achieved Please use up all the power of battery for the first time before charging, and then take a full charge, thus the battery can be reached the optimum effect of using. Recharge the battery once every 3 months if it will not be used for a long period of time Using your equipment in temperatures lower than 5℃ may affect replacement battery performance
